title: cupressus × hybrida
intro: Cupressus × hybrida, also known as the Monterey cypress, is a hybrid evergreen tree that is a cross between Cupressus macrocarpa and Cupressus lusitanica. This tree has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cupressus × hybrida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Cupressus × hybrida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
